com.saxonica.functions.json

Class JsonHandlerMap

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.saxonica.functions.json.JsonHandlerMap
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    JsonHandler

    public class JsonHandlerMap
extends java.lang.Object
implements JsonHandler
    Event handler for the JSON parser which constructs a structure of maps and arrays representing the content of the JSON text. (Arrays at this point are represented by maps whose keys are consecutive integers; to enable an empty array to be distinguished, it always contains a key of integer -1, whose associated value is an empty sequence).

                 throws XPathException
        Write a string value
